name: package_nftables_and_service_disabled_firewalld_and_system_with_kernel
xml_content: <ns0:platform xmlns:ns0="http://cpe.mitre.org/language/2.0" id="package_nftables_and_service_disabled_firewalld_and_system_with_kernel"><ns0:logical-test operator="AND" negate="false"><ns0:check-fact-ref system="http://oval.mitre.org/XMLSchema/oval-definitions-5" href="ssg-rhel9-cpe-oval.xml" id-ref="oval:ssg-package_nftables:def:1" /><ns0:check-fact-ref system="http://oval.mitre.org/XMLSchema/oval-definitions-5" href="ssg-rhel9-cpe-oval.xml" id-ref="oval:ssg-service_disabled_firewalld:def:1" /><ns0:check-fact-ref system="http://oval.mitre.org/XMLSchema/oval-definitions-5" href="ssg-rhel9-cpe-oval.xml" id-ref="oval:ssg-system_with_kernel:def:1" /></ns0:logical-test></ns0:platform>
bash_conditional: ( rpm --quiet -q nftables && ! (systemctl is-active firewalld &>/dev/null) && rpm --quiet -q kernel-core )
